children.text: Trump Organization handover plan slammed by ethics chief
The director of the US Office of Government Ethics has criticized Donald Trump's plan to hand control of his business empire to his sons before his inauguration on 20 January.
Trump Expected To Name Jared Kushner as a Senior Adviser

Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner is expected to be named as a senior adviser to the president and to assume an official role in the West Wing in coming weeks, according to two senior Trump transition officials.
Everything The Internet Is Saying About Donald Trump In One Easy Feed

On Monday, President Trump reinstated Reagan-era abortion restrictions, officially withdrew US involvement in the TPP, and had his administration's first press briefing. Follow it all with our Trump channel.
